title: S3 Pre-Signed URL Generator
description: Built a secure system to generate time-limited URLs for objects stored in AWS S3. Enables controlled and temporary access for secure file sharing without exposing bucket credentials.

title: Real-Time Infrastructure Monitoring
description: Developed a full monitoring system on AWS EC2 using Prometheus and Grafana. Visualized live metrics — CPU usage, memory, disk I/O, network traffic, and uptime — with custom dashboards.

title: Portfolio Website (This Site)
description: Full-stack portfolio with a Node.js REST API backend. Deployed on AWS EC2 with Nginx as reverse proxy, containerized using Docker + Docker Compose, and automated with a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline.
